mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

mxCell.value: Send chat message with questionnaire link
User Registration Flow - Event Driven Design
Industry, size, location, goals, challenges, etc.
AI/ML model processes: - Industry requirements - Skill gaps - Business maturity
Matching criteria: - Industry similarity - Complementary services - Geographic proximity - Business stage
Content types: - Articles - Videos - Case studies - Expert posts
Event filters: - Industry events - Skill workshops - Networking events - Webinars
Scoring factors: - Topic relevance - Timing fit - Location/timezone - Attendee profiles
Details: - Title & Description - Date & Time - Location/Virtual - Costs & Tickets - Capacity & Rules - Tags & Categories
Event Data: - eventId - organizerId - metadata - status: draft/published
Matching Criteria: - Event category/tags - Location proximity - Price range - Date availability - Past attendance patterns
User Filters: - Interest categories - Location settings - Budget preferences - Calendar availability - Engagement history
ML Model scores: - Interest relevance (0-1) - Location match (0-1) - Time availability (0-1) - Price sensitivity (0-1) - Social connections (0-1)
Payload includes: - eventId - matchedUsers[] - matchScores[] - recommendationReasons[]
Feed placement based on: - Relevance score - Time sensitivity - User engagement patterns
Batch update info: - Total users updated - Average position - Update timestamp
Channels: - In-app messages - Email - Push notifications - SMS (if opted-in)
Personalization: - User name - Relevance reason - Friend attendees - Early bird offers
Metrics: - Total sent - Channel breakdown - Delivery status
Post content: - Text/Media - Tags/Topics - Visibility settings - Mentions
Checks: - Inappropriate content - Spam detection - Policy compliance
Post data: - postId - userId - content - metadata - timestamp
Criteria from: - Post topics - Author industry - Content type - Hashtags
Business matching: - Questionnaire alignment - Industry relevance - Interest overlap - Past engagement
Business Score Factors: - Topic relevance (0-1) - Industry match (0-1) - Size compatibility (0-1) - Activity level (0-1)
Connection types: - Direct friends - 2nd degree - Following - Followers
Group checks: - Membership status - Posting permissions - Group relevance - Activity rules
Activity metrics: - View history - Like patterns - Comment frequency - Share behavior
Ranking Formula: Match Score * 0.25 + Friend Score * 0.20 + Group Score * 0.15 + Activity Score * 0.20 + Recency Score * 0.10 + Engagement Score * 0.10
Score Tiers: - Premium (>0.8) - High (0.6-0.8) - Medium (0.4-0.6) - Low (0.2-0.4) - Minimal (<0.2)
Position factors: - Current feed freshness - Post density - User online status - Feed diversity
Reorder factors: - New post rank - Existing post decay - Time sensitivity - Diversity rules
Algorithms: - Chronological decay - Engagement boost - Diversity injection - Freshness balance
Metrics tracked: - Total reach - Distribution time - Tier breakdown - Reorder impact
Lesson Questionnaire Completion & Social Distribution Flow
Answer types: - Multiple choice - Text responses - Rating scales - Case studies - Reflection questions
Answer data: - questionnaireId - userId - lessonId - answers[] - timeSpent - attemptNumber
Scoring: - Correctness - Completion time - Answer depth - Reflection quality
Point calculation: - Base completion: 10pts - Correct answers: +5pts each - Speed bonus: +10pts - Perfect score: +25pts - Streak bonus: +15pts
Achievement checks: - First questionnaire - 10-day streak - Perfect week - Topic mastery - Level up
ML Analysis: - Knowledge gaps - Strength areas - Learning pace - Preferred formats - Engagement patterns
Adaptations: - Reorder modules - Add remedial content - Skip mastered topics - Adjust difficulty - Change pace
Filter for: - Public questions - Reflection answers - Case studies - Insights shared
Post includes: - Lesson context - Selected answers - User insights - Achievement badges - Discussion prompt
Match by: - Same lesson - Similar score - Same industry - Learning path overlap
Business matching: - Topic relevance - Skill interest - Hiring needs - Industry alignment
Scoring factors: - Learning similarity: 0.3 - Social connection: 0.2 - Topic interest: 0.2 - Engagement history: 0.15 - Business match: 0.15
Post format: - Question highlight - User's answer - Score/Badge - Engagement options - Similar answers link
Other Users Engage with Answer Post
Metrics: - Answer quality - Engagement rates - Learning impact - Social reach - Business interest
Questionnaire complete! Points earned, plan adapted, answers shared socially
Item details: - Title & Description - Category & Tags - Price & Currency - Images/Media - Target audience - Availability - Terms & Conditions
Item data: - itemId - sellerId - SKU - inventory count - pricing tiers - shipping options
Audience signals: - Category preferences - Price point - Geographic availability - Use case patterns - Demographics
Post includes: - Product showcase - Key features - Special offer - Call to action - Marketplace link
Friend filters: - Purchase history - Interest overlap - Geographic match - Activity level
Group checks: - Allow marketplace posts - Category relevance - Member interests - Group guidelines
Cooperator matching: - Same target audience - Complementary products - Non-competing - Geographic overlap - Partnership history
Synergy factors: - Audience overlap: 0.3 - Product complement: 0.25 - Market presence: 0.2 - Reputation: 0.15 - Collaboration fit: 0.1
Cooperation types: - Cross-promotion - Bundle opportunity - Referral partner - Distribution channel - Co-marketing
Friend factors: - Relationship strength - Purchase affinity - Interaction history
Group factors: - Group relevance - Member activity - Topic alignment
Business factors: - Synergy score - Business size match - Market position
Card shows: - Product image - Price & discount - Friend selling badge
Shows: - Group context - Member discount - Group discussion
Shows: - Collaboration potential - Audience overlap % - Partnership CTA
Message includes: - Mutual audience size - Synergy explanation - Collaboration ideas - Connect button
Metrics: - Total reach - Feed placements - Cooperator interest - Click-through rate - Conversion funnel
Item published! Distributed to friends, groups & potential partners
Checks: - Not already friends - Not blocked - Privacy settings - Request limits
Request data: - requestId - senderId - recipientId - status: pending - message (optional)
Base factors: - Profile similarity - Interest overlap - Network distance - Activity patterns - Industry/profession
Update: - status: accepted - acceptedAt: timestamp - connectionType: friend
Group analysis: - Common groups - Group activity level - Role in groups - Join date proximity
Event analysis: - Attended same events - Event type similarity - Frequency of overlap - Future event matches
Purchase analysis: - Category overlap - Price range match - Brand preferences - Purchase frequency - Wishlist similarity
Questionnaire analysis: - Same questionnaires - Answer similarity - Score proximity - Topic interests - Learning paths
Events consumed: - GroupWeightCalculated - EventWeightCalculated - PurchaseWeightCalculated - QuestionnaireWeightCalculated
Weight formula: Base match: 0.25 Groups: 0.20 Events: 0.20 Purchases: 0.15 Questionnaires: 0.20
ML optimization: - Historical success - Engagement patterns - User segment - Time factors
Content filters: - Privacy settings - Time window (30 days) - Content quality - Engagement level
Integration for Recipient: - High weight posts: Top 20% - Medium weight: Middle 40% - Low weight: Bottom 40% - Time decay applied
Post score: Weight * Recency * Engagement * Relevance
Rules include: - Auto-include threshold - Boost factor - Decay rate - Update frequency
Metrics tracked: - Integration depth - Weight distribution - Engagement change - Feed quality score
Friends connected! Feeds integrated based on multiple matching factors
Ticket data: - Unique ticket ID - QR code - Event details - Seat/spot info - Terms & conditions
Calendar entry: - Event details - Location/link - Ticket reference - Reminder settings
Reminders: - 1 week before - 1 day before - 2 hours before - Custom user prefs
Connection formula: Event history: 0.25 Questionnaires: 0.25 Groups: 0.25 Audiences: 0.25
Initial weights: Strong connection: 0.6 Medium: 0.4 Weak: 0.2 + Event participation: +0.1
Week before: Base weight + 0.2 Boost factor: 1.5x
Day before: Base weight + 0.4 Boost factor: 2x Priority placement
Priority rules: - Top 10% of feed - Event context badge - Participant indicator - Engagement prompt
Event day: - Participant posts pinned - Live updates enabled - Interactive features - Real-time chat
Enhanced features: - Participant badges - Direct messaging - Meetup suggestions - Shared interests
Post-event decay: Day 1-3: 75% weight Day 4-7: 50% weight Day 8+: 25% weight Day 15+: Normal weight
Event participation complete! Feed enriched with participant content
